narrative:
Phillipsburg (precinct in Montgomery County) has 312 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.2 percentage points.
